mapper.sql: rule_id, tenant_id, rule_name, rule_version, effective_date, change_reason, configuration_json::text AS configuration_json, configuration_sha256, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, status, drafted_by_account_id, drafted_by_user_id, submitted_by_account_id, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_at, activated_by_account_id, activated_by_user_id, activated_at, create_time, update_time
audit_id, rule_id, tenant_id, event_type, configuration_sha256, change_reason, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_role_key, actor_committee_position, create_time

confirmation_id, rule_id, tenant_id, configuration_sha256, field_key, source_page_number, source_clause, status, confirmed_by_account_id, confirmed_by_user_id, confirmed_by_committee_position, confirmed_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_owners_assembly_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND effective_date <= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY effective_date DESC, rule_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM t_owners_assembly_rule WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM t_owners_assembly_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 WHEN 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' THEN 1 WHEN 'DRAFT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, effective_date DESC, rule_id DESC
SELECT tenant_id FROM t_tenant_community WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_owners_assembly_rule ( tenant_id, rule_name, rule_version, effective_date, change_reason, configuration_json, configuration_sha256, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, status, drafted_by_account_id, drafted_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleVersion}, #{effectiveDate}, #{changeReason}, CAST(#{configurationJson} AS jsonb), #{configurationSha256}, #{objectKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{etag}, #{sha256}, #{status}, #{draftedByAccountId}, #{draftedByUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_owners_assembly_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, rule_version = #{ruleVersion}, effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, change_reason = #{changeReason}, configuration_json = CAST(#{configurationJson} AS jsonb), configuration_sha256 = #{configurationSha256}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'DRAFT'

UPDATE t_owners_assembly_rule SET status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION', submitted_by_account_id = #{accountId}, submitted_by_user_id = #{userId}, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE t_owners_assembly_rule SET status = 'SUPERSEDED', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE t_owners_assembly_rule SET status = 'ACTIVE', activated_by_account_id = #{accountId}, activated_by_user_id = #{userId}, activated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_owners_assembly_rule_audit WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY audit_id ASC
